mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id AS merchantId, name, base_bid AS baseBid, min_bid AS minBid, max_bid AS maxBid, status, priority FROM bid_strategy WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bid_strategy(merchant_id, name, base_bid, min_bid, max_bid, status, priority) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{baseBid}, #{minBid}, #{maxBid}, #{status}, #{priority})
mapper.update: UPDATE bid_strategy SET name=#{name}, base_bid=#{baseBid}, min_bid=#{minBid}, max_bid=#{maxBid}, status=#{status}, priority=#{priority} WHERE id=#{id}
